title: pythius obtusata
intro: Pythius obtusata, also known as the obtuse pythius, is a type of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pythius obtusata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Pythius obtusata typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
